name: biblioteca-backend
description: API REST do Sistema de Gerenciamento de Biblioteca - Projeto 2

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist',{recursive:true}); fs.writeFileSync('dist/index.html','API backend pronta para execução serverless.'); console.log('Backend preparado para deploy')"
scripts.db:reset: sequelize-cli db:migrate:undo:all && sequelize-cli db:migrate && sequelize-cli db:seed:all
